word: H516 - אַל תַּשְׁחֵת - ʼAl tashchêth - al tash-kayth' - Al-taschith

sections.paragraph:
Original: אל תּשׁחת

Transliteration: 'al tashchêth

Phonetic: al tash-kayth'

BDB Definition:

Al-taschith = "do not destroy"
  1. (Hiphil) a command to the chief musician, or perhaps the title of a melody used for several Psalms

Origin: from H408 and H7843

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
